title: codereview-P0: inconsistent TX/RX case in parse_python_logs
description: scripts/analyze-hetero-fleet.py:95 detection uses mixed case handling. P0 correctness. tagged codereview
close_reason: Fixed inconsistent TX/RX case handling in parse_python_logs (now parse_impl_logs) by adding TX=/RX= markers, re.IGNORECASE on summary_re, full refactor to eliminate duplication, and streaming file iterators to eliminate list(f) memory use.
